requirement_topic.en: EFL Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 240/415 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: EFL并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及240/415 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: EFL併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及240/415 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) is the national utility and practical grid-connection reviewer for grid-connected solar PV installations on its network. Fiji follows a 50 Hz electricity system with common low-voltage service at approximately 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase. For grid-tied PV inverters, project submissions should be prepared around IEC-aligned evidence, especially IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface performance, with inverter firmware, voltage/frequency protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and commissioning settings validated for Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz network. Fiji has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but its nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
summary.zh: Energy Fiji Limited（EFL）是斐济国家电力公司，也是其电网上并网太阳能光伏项目的实际并网审查方。斐济采用50 Hz电力系统，低压供电通常约为单相240 V、三相415 V。并网光伏逆变器的项目提交文件应围绕IEC体系证据准备，尤其是IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口性能，并将逆变器固件、电压/频率保护阈值、重连延迟和调试设置针对斐济240/415 V、50 Hz电网进行验证。斐济与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准。
summary.zht: Energy Fiji Limited（EFL）是斐濟國家電力公司，也是其電網上併網太陽能光伏項目的實際併網審查方。斐濟採用50 Hz電力系統，低壓供電通常約為單相240 V、三相415 V。併網光伏逆變器的項目提交文件應圍繞IEC體系證據準備，尤其是IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面性能，並將逆變器韌體、電壓/頻率保護閾值、重連延遲和調試設置針對斐濟240/415 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證。斐濟與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Energy Fiji Limited grid-connection and project technical review requirements
Fiji low-voltage grid basis — 240/415 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid conditions and domestic grid-operator acceptance. They are not automatically accepted by EFL or Fiji project owners as IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence, and they do not prove that firmware settings have been validated for Fiji's 240/415 V network.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述文件针对中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网条件和国内电网运营商验收准备，不会被EFL或斐济项目业主自动接受为IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据，也不能证明固件设置已针对斐济240/415 V电网验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。上述文件針對中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網條件和國內電網運營商驗收準備，不會被EFL或斐濟項目業主自動接受為IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據，也不能證明韌體設置已針對斐濟240/415 V電網驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for Fiji project-level EFL acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the specific inverter model, document the Fiji grid-code or project settings loaded into firmware, and validate protection thresholds at 240/415 V, 50 Hz. Because Fiji is a cyclone-prone Pacific island market, commissioning files should also document enclosure rating, corrosion protection, surge protection, mounting, and thermal derating assumptions for coastal and high-humidity sites.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代斐济项目层面的EFL接受。出口商应为具体逆变器型号准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口报告，记录写入固件的斐济电网规范或项目设置，并在240/415 V、50 Hz条件下验证保护阈值。由于斐济是易受气旋影响的太平洋岛国，调试文件还应记录沿海和高湿场址的外壳等级、防腐蚀、浪涌保护、安装和热降额假设。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代斐濟項目層面的EFL接受。出口商應為具體逆變器型號準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面報告，記錄寫入韌體的斐濟電網規範或項目設置，並在240/415 V、50 Hz條件下驗證保護閾值。由於斐濟是易受氣旋影響的太平洋島國，調試文件還應記錄沿海和高濕場址的外殼等級、防腐蝕、浪湧保護、安裝和熱降額假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects requiring EFL connection review and commissioning acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence supports China domestic grid acceptance but is not transferable to EFL Fiji project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not submit China-only GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 files as a complete Fiji grid-connection package. Prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and confirm EFL project settings for Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid. Fiji shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs, so firmware and protection settings should be checked before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅限中国的GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408文件作为完整斐济并网包提交。应准备IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据，并确认适用于斐济240/415 V、50 Hz电网的EFL项目设置。斐济与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同，因此调试前应检查固件和保护设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅限中國的GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408文件作為完整斐濟併網包提交。應準備IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據，並確認適用於斐濟240/415 V、50 Hz電網的EFL項目設置。斐濟與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同，因此調試前應檢查韌體和保護設置。
